name: the snow expanse
identity: A vast, frozen wilderness where the player awakens after a fall. It is a desolate and quiet place, with dark trees and a setting sun casting long shadows.
current_status: The player is disoriented and recovering from a fall, with a throbbing temple and shallow breaths. They are in the middle of a snowy expanse, trying to orient themselves.

appearance.value: Vast, frozen wilderness with dark trees and a setting sun. Snow-covered ground with fresh, untouched snow.

volatile_state.condition: Player is disoriented and recovering from a fall, with a throbbing temple and shallow breaths.
volatile_state.current_activity: Trying to orient oneself and determine the next course of action.
